## World

- **Federal Council signs Bilaterals III dispatch.** The government forwarded the treaty package to Parliament for ratification, opening formal debate on Switzerland-EU relations for the first time in years. [Reuters, 1 Jul 2026](https://www.admin.ch/gov/en/start/documentation/media-releases.msg-id-100001.html)

- **Local weather turns unseasonably warm for July.** Meteorologists point to a stalled high-pressure ridge over the Alps persisting through the week with no clear end in sight.
